sections.paragraph:
ἀπώλεια, ας, ἡ [ἀπόλλυμι] central sense ‘destruction’

—1. of extravagant expenditure waste, loss Mt 26:8; Mk 14:4.

—2. of terrible loss one experiences ruin, destruction, freq. with stress on its eternal aspect: Mt 7:13; J 17:12; Ac 8:20; Ro 9:22; Phil 1:28; 3:19; 2 Th 2:3; 1 Ti 6:9; Hb 10:39; 2 Pt 2:3; 3:7, 16; Rv 17:8, 11. Of divisive teaching that is destructive 2 Pt 2:1a and its destructive consequence vs. 1b.
